{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Cinnal
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Cinnal]] is an [[Aether Technician]] who requested a wizard to recover abyssal iron.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
